title: OASA books net foreign buy of 67.02 million
body: PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk (OASA) posted net foreign buy of 67.02 million shares at the closing today (3/1), putting this company at the top of net foreign leaderboard in the market.

title: Three bonds due in January; two from financial sector
body: The maturity of three bonds from three distinct issuers marks the January bond call news. Two of them are finance sector bonds.

title: Indotambang Perkasa dumps 2.27 billion shares of Astrindo Nusantara (BIPI)
body: December 30, PT Indotambang Perkasa sold 2.27 billion shares of PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), making it the highlight of the list of stock transactions by investors holding 5% or more shares.

title: TGRA's recovery efforts: rights issue plans and acquisition
body: TGRA's difficulties began with its undersubscribed IPO on May 15, 2017, where it raised only IDR 110 billion, far below the IDR 1.5 trillion needed for capital expenditures to build its five PLTMs.

title: Dozens of domestic textile factories collapsed, the number of layoffs reached 250 thousand
body: The threat of illegal imports continues to pressure textile factories, resulting in a high number of layoffs from the textile industry in the last 2 years.

title: OASA books net foreign buy of 67.02 million
body: PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk (OASA) posted net foreign buy of 67.02 million shares at the closing today (3/1), putting this company at the top of net foreign leaderboard in the market.

title: Three bonds due in January; two from financial sector
body: The maturity of three bonds from three distinct issuers marks the January bond call news. Two of them are finance sector bonds.

title: Indotambang Perkasa dumps 2.27 billion shares of Astrindo Nusantara (BIPI)
body: December 30, PT Indotambang Perkasa sold 2.27 billion shares of PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), making it the highlight of the list of stock transactions by investors holding 5% or more shares.

title: TGRA's recovery efforts: rights issue plans and acquisition
body: TGRA's difficulties began with its undersubscribed IPO on May 15, 2017, where it raised only IDR 110 billion, far below the IDR 1.5 trillion needed for capital expenditures to build its five PLTMs.

title: Dozens of domestic textile factories collapsed, the number of layoffs reached 250 thousand
body: The threat of illegal imports continues to pressure textile factories, resulting in a high number of layoffs from the textile industry in the last 2 years.

title: IPO prospects of HGII: Renewable energy holding targeted by Japanese investors
body: PT Hero Global Investment Tbk (HGII) has begun its Initial Public Offering (IPO) period today (3/1) until January 7, and the company will list its shares on Thursday, January 9, 2025.

title: Asuransi Digital Bersama to make debut on January 8, following KSIX and RATU
body: PT Asuransi Digital Bersama Tbk (YOII) is offering 412.09 million shares to the public through an Initial Public Offering (IPO), with the stock price set at the lower limit of Rp100 per share.

title: OJK to takeover crypto asset supervisor role next week
body: The transition of Bappebti from Ministry of Trading to OJK will not pose any major challenges.

title: TCPI to hold private placement, retail investors’ shares potentially diluted 1.82%
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) plans a Capital Increase Without Pre-emptive Rights, or private placement, of 500 million shares.

title: Opening the year bullish, JCI jumped 1.18% to 7,163.21
body: JCI was closed at positive at the beginning of this year despite slowing-down in sectoral indices.

title: Analyst projects promising prospect in retail sector; MDIY on the rise?
body: Analyst at PT Binaartha Sekuritas, Nafan Ali, mentioned that the prospect of retail sector in Indonesia is quite promising, supported by solid economic foundation and increased domestic consumption.

title: Net foreign began the year with 337 million shares of net sell
body: In the first trading day of 2025, foreign transactions ended with a net sell of 337.04 million shares.

title: POLI sells shares of two subsidiaries
body: PT Pollux Hotels Group Tbk (POLI) sold its shares in two of its subsidiaries to PT Sentosa Prima Siji (SPS) in a transaction earlier this week (30/12).

title: IDX targets 66 companies to debut on stock market by 2025
body: IDX optimistic that there will be many IPOs this year, amidst the high shadow of interest rates.

title: Bank of India Indonesia targets 100% profit increase this year
body: “Despite the issue of VAT increasing to 12%, BOII is optimistic about achieving 100% net profit growth by the end of 2025,” the management stated during the Public Expose.

title: PACK secured approval for rights issue of 100 billion shares
body: PT Solusi Kemasan Digital Tbk (PACK) has been greenlit regarding its rights issue plan to improve its working capital entering 2025. This corporate action had been approved by shareholders last Monday (30/12).

title: December 2024’s inflation slowed to 1.57%
body: The inflation rate in December 2024 was reported at 1.57%, slowing down year-on-year (yoy) from December 2023 at 2.61%.

title: Karya Media Investindo claims 8% of MDTV Media (NETV) with its 3.30 billion shares
body: PT Karya Media Investindo, which invested 3.30 billion shares in the broadcasting media firm PT MDTV Media Technologies Tbk (NETV), started the stock buying and selling transaction by investors holding more than 5% on Friday, December 27.

title: MOLI to merge 2 subsidiaries
body: PT Madusari Murni Indah Tbk (MOLI) is merging two of its subsidiaries for business efficiency purposes.

title: Still focusing on debt settlement, Krakatau Steel to reevaluate subsidiary’s IPO plan
body: PT Krakatau Steel (Persero) Tbk (KRAS) is open to the opportunity to debut its subsidiary in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Rebranding to AZKO, take a look at ACES’s next move
body: PT Aspirasi Hidup Indonesia Tbk (ACES) has officially rebranded its household product retail outlets Ace Hardware to “AZKO,” announced right on January 1, 2025.

title: Setting IPO price to IDR 452 per share, Kentanix Supra International to debut early January
body: PT Kentanix Supra International Tbk (KSIX), a real estate and property issuer, is ready to list its shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) by offering 320.67 million shares for IDR 452 each.

title: Economists predict December inflation soaring up to 1.6% yoy
body: Several economists are projecting that the yearly inflation of Indonesia as of December 2024 will increase approximately to 1.6% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Erajaya enters electric vehicle industry
body: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA) is expanding its business portfolio as official distributor of Chinese-manufactured electric vehicle under the brand XPeng, through its affiliated entity, PT Era Inovasi Otomotif (EIO).

title: Standing in for Prabowo, Sri Mulyani opens first trading day
body: Ministry of Finance, Sri Mulyani Indrawati, commence the first trading session of the year at Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX), standing in for President Prabowo Subianto.

title: Fixing IPO price to the highest, RATU is set to raise IDR 624.46 billion
body: PT Raharja Energi Cepu Tbk (RATU), the soon-to-be oil and gas mining issuer directly under PT Rukun Raharja Tbk (RAJA), has set the initial public offering (IPO) price to the upper range, of IDR 1,150 per share.

title: Opening the year strong, JCI saw uptrend this morning
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) saw gains at the morning session of the first trading day in 2025.

title: YELO targets IDR 325.32 billion in 2025 revenue
body: PT Yelooo Data Integra Tbk (YELO) will focus on implementing a number of business strategies to achieve its revenue target of IDR 325.32 billion by 2025.

title: BBCA closes the year with market cap of IDR 1.18 quadrillion
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) booked market capitalisation of IDR 1.18 quadrillion as of December 2024, up 2.87% compared to December 2023 of IDR 1.14 quadrillion.

title: Indocement wraps up shares buyback of IDR 565.05 billion
body: PT Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa Tbk (INTP) has concluded its shares buyback program, spending IDR 565.05 billion through the process.

title: MDLN’s shareholders agreed upon 50% asset guarantee
body: Shareholders agreed upon the plan of PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN) of submitting guarantee of over 50% of total company assets for loan collateral.

title: TRON detailed business strategy for 2025
body: PT Teknologi Karya Digital Nusa Tbk (TRON) reveals its strategic measures to face 2025 challenges.

title: IKAI readies capex of IDR 40 billion in 2025
body: PT Intikeramik Alamasri Industri Tbk (IKAI) is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 40 billion for 2025.

title: Final trading day in 2024, JCI closed higher at 7,079.90
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was closed 0.62% or 43.33 points higher at 7,079.90 on this last day of transaction in 2024.

title: End-of-year, net foreign closed at 385 million shares of net sell
body: Foreign investor transactions on the final trading day of 2024 ended with 384.96 million shares of net sell.
